sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82322" key="perisfragismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισφρᾱγισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n82322.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">birthmark</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope> </bibl>(pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
